evals.prompt: Run __SKILL_NAME__ with the original example inputs.
evals.expected_output: The agent completes the workflow and verifies the success signal.
The agent substitutes changed inputs without hardcoding recording values.
assertions: Does not hardcode the original trace inputs
Substitutes changed parameters in the correct steps

evals.expected_output: The agent collects evidence and routes deeper diagnosis to Steel debugging or reliability skills as needed.
assertions: Routes bot/proxy/CAPTCHA mitigation to steel-reliability when relevant
